name: Skull of Restless Souls
effects: Necromancy: raise 1 Restless Souls Undead to fight for you. Attack Mode: Summon Undead skeletons that last for 5 seconds and chases enemies. Defense Mode: Summon Undead skeletons with 1500 HP that last for 10 seconds and protects the user, heal 50 HP within 5 squares upon decaying.
Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target
